sourceRefs.summary: Dataset inventory generated by worker C from local PDFs, selected supplements, GEO, Nature, and GitHub locators.

missingOrUnconfirmed.whyMissing: The paper states source codes are available upon request; no public repository is listed in the PDF.
missingOrUnconfirmed.impact: Exact figure reproduction may diverge from the authors' custom scripts, especially peak clustering, overlap thresholds, plotting, and filtering decisions.
missingOrUnconfirmed.proxyOrAlternative: Reimplement from methods using Bismark, trim_galore, Bowtie2, SAMtools, MACS14/MACS2, bedtools, deepTools, HOMER, and R; compare against Supplementary Tables S3/S6.

missingOrUnconfirmed.whyMissing: The histone-mark ChIP-seq pipeline is public at GitHub, but the paper says other NOMe-seq and RNA-seq source codes are available upon request.
missingOrUnconfirmed.impact: Broad-domain and H3K27ac overlap checks can start from public processed tables, but temporal RNA expression and NOMe-derived accessibility checks may not exactly match author implementation.
missingOrUnconfirmed.proxyOrAlternative: Use public GSE242515 processed data and Supplementary Tables S5/S8 for first-pass checks; reimplement RNA-seq with HISAT2/RSeQC/DESeq2 and NOMe-seq as described in methods.

sourceRefs.summary: Public GitHub repository for uniform histone-mark ChIP-seq processing.

missingOrUnconfirmed.whyMissing: GSE73952, GSM772836, and GSM772948 were extracted from the paper, but detailed sample metadata and genome-build compatibility were not materialized in this worker pass.
missingOrUnconfirmed.impact: Figure 3d style broad-domain comparison across mouse embryo and human CD4 data is vulnerable to genome build, cell type, and peak-calling threshold differences.
missingOrUnconfirmed.proxyOrAlternative: First reproduce within-study broad H3K4me3 domain counts from GSE242515 and Supplementary Table S5; postpone cross-study comparisons until comparator metadata are verified.

missingOrUnconfirmed.whyMissing: GEO/SRA accessions were located and verified at landing-page level, but raw FASTQ/BAM and large processed tar files were not downloaded by this worker.
missingOrUnconfirmed.impact: The current artifacts prove discoverability and likely availability, not executable reproduction. Any claim verdict must remain not-tested or insufficient-evidence until data are materialized and analyses run.
missingOrUnconfirmed.proxyOrAlternative: Use selected supplementary tables already downloaded for a bounded first-pass check; then materialize processed GEO files before raw SRA.

sourceRefs.summary: 2020 main GEO record; page-level verification only.
2025 main GEO record; page-level verification only.

missingOrUnconfirmed.whyMissing: Only selected high-priority supplementary tables were downloaded and dimensions inspected. Full supplement parsing was not completed.
missingOrUnconfirmed.impact: Some figure-specific claims may require other tables or supplementary figures not yet in local inventory.
missingOrUnconfirmed.proxyOrAlternative: Download and parse all Nature supplement files in a subsequent stage; current local subset covers 2020 sample metadata/de novo peaks/6-Z peaks and 2025 sample metadata/broad domains/temporal expression gene sets.

sourceRefs.summary: Local supplement subset downloaded by worker C.

negativeResultBoundary.currentStatus: No scientific negative result has been established in this worker pass.
negativeResultBoundary.reason: Failures or gaps are data/code access and materialization gaps, not reproduced statistical contradictions.
negativeResultBoundary.verdictPolicy: Use not-tested for claims with located data but no computation; use insufficient-evidence when a causal or mechanistic claim requires perturbation, timing, or CO/NCO evidence not yet checked.
